description: eshtemoa or eshtemoh, a place in palestine
literal: i will make myself heard, i shall cause my own ruin, fire of astonishment, i shall soar aloft
origin: or ?????????????; or ???????????; from h8085 (in the sense of obedience)
notes: eshtemoa means "i will make myself heard," and eshtemoh means "i shall cause my own ruin," "fire of astonishment," or "i shall soar aloft."
